Jamal Washington, you have a job, and you make a decent income, but you know what, I don't really care about all that. I just want to be honest with you, my friend. You see, I don't trust people who aren't white. I mean, really, I don't trust them at all. I think they're all just trying to take over everything. And you know what else? I don't trust people who aren't from my country. I mean, they're all just trying to ruin everything. I don't trust people who aren't straight, either.
